round32_analysis.analysis: Very balanced fixture; penalties and small goal-margin events matter a lot.
Germany is a clear favorite; South Korea likely needs a low-scoring match or penalties.
Netherlands is a clear favorite; Haiti likely needs a low-scoring match or penalties.
Brazil has the edge, but the matchup is close enough for tactical swings.
France has the edge, but the matchup is close enough for tactical swings.
Senegal has the edge, but the matchup is close enough for tactical swings.
Mexico has the edge, but the matchup is close enough for tactical swings.
Norway has the edge, but the matchup is close enough for tactical swings.
Very balanced fixture; penalties and small goal-margin events matter a lot.

Very balanced fixture; penalties and small goal-margin events matter a lot.
